en: Welcome to another video from the series. Word of the day 16 is Vulnerability
Vulnerability means the quality or state of being exposed to the possibility of being attacked
or harmed either physically or emotionally.
Example 1. I will not be a vulnerability to others can exploit.
Example 2. This leads to increased vulnerability to both major and minor ailments.
Request you to create your own sentences with this word vulnerability
and update the comment box of this video. Thank you.
